stories.headline: OpenAI is building a ChatGPT smart speaker with a camera
stories.blurb: Bloomberg reports OpenAI's first hardware device will be a screenless smart speaker that talks with ChatGPT and uses a camera plus sensors to understand your environment. No release date yet, but it could arrive this year—just days after Apple sued OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft.
stories.why_it_matters: ChatGPT could become something you talk to in your kitchen, not just your browser.
stories.original_headline: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year

stories.headline: Spotify Premium now lets you chat with an AI to find music and podcasts
stories.blurb: Spotify is testing a chatbot feature called 'Talk to Spotify' that lets Premium subscribers type requests to discover and play music, audiobooks, and podcasts. The AI appears in the Home and Now Playing screens on mobile, turning search into conversation.
stories.why_it_matters: Voice and chat interfaces are replacing menus in consumer apps — even for browsing music.
stories.original_headline: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too

stories.headline: IBM lost $69 billion in market value in a single day
stories.blurb: Shares plunged 25% after the company warned that AI spending is eating into budgets companies once used for traditional software and services—the kind IBM has sold for decades. Customers are choosing cloud AI tools over IBM's legacy products.
stories.why_it_matters: AI isn't just creating winners—it's reshaping who loses as enterprise budgets shift.
stories.original_headline: IBM Loses $69 Billion of Market Value in One Day in Latest AI-Fueled Selloff

stories.headline: Apple can finally ship Apple Intelligence to China
stories.blurb: Apple reached an agreement with Beijing to bring Siri and other AI features to Chinese iPhones by partnering with local AI companies. Chinese law requires foreign tech companies to use domestic AI models, which blocked Apple Intelligence's rollout there since last year's iOS 27 beta launch.
stories.why_it_matters: China is Apple's third-largest market—this deal unlocks AI features for hundreds of millions of iPhones.
stories.original_headline: Apple reaches agreement with Chinese government on Apple Intelligence rollout

try_this_prompt.title: The hiring red-flag translator
try_this_prompt.prompt: I just finished interviewing a candidate. I'll describe what they said and how they answered below. Don't tell me whether to hire them — I need to decide that. Instead, surface the one thing I'm probably downplaying because I liked them, and the one strength I'm probably overlooking because I didn't.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Right after the interview, before you talk yourself into or out of someone.

daily_question: If your phone had a camera that could see what you're doing all day, what's the one thing you'd want it to help with?
